narrative:
Etna  Twp township has 13,981 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
